assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and a business email address.
No Airwallex sandbox account, Client ID, or API key exists yet.
Sandbox first success is acceptable; production keys are out of scope.

developer_goal: Create an Airwallex sandbox account and complete the earliest official authenticated API first-success path.

first_success.outcome: Unresolved between obtaining a sandbox access token and calling a first product API after choosing admin versus scoped keys.
first_success.observable_signal: Sandbox docs show authentication/login returning a bearer token, then optionally calling balances or other APIs; Manage API keys makes key type consequential.

route_selection.surface: Airwallex sandbox signup plus Developer API keys and Authentication API
route_selection.rule: Select the shortest complete sandbox route only after API-key type, org versus account scope, and terminal success (token versus first product call) are fixed.

candidates.name: Sandbox admin API key then Obtain access token
candidates.reason: Sandbox overview demonstrates Client ID and API key login to get a token, but admin versus scoped keys and whether token alone is first success remain open.

candidates.name: Sandbox scoped API key with least-privilege resources then Obtain access token
candidates.reason: Manage API keys documents scoped keys with organization and account permission matrices that change required fields and later API reach.

candidates.name: Token plus first product call such as balances/current
candidates.reason: Sandbox testing docs immediately show a follow-on authenticated balances request, which may be a stronger first-success signal than token issuance alone.

required_path.action: Create an Airwallex sandbox account from the official sandbox signup form.

required_fields.label: Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy agreement

required_path.observable_result: The sandbox account is ready and the developer can log in to the sandbox web app.

required_path.action: Log in to the sandbox web app with the new sandbox credentials.
required_path.observable_result: The developer can open Account Developer API keys.

required_path.action: Generate the selected sandbox API key type and copy Client ID and API key.

required_fields.label: Scoped resources and account targets when scoped

required_path.observable_result: Sandbox Client ID and API key secret are available.

required_path.action: Call Obtain access token in the sandbox environment, then complete any selected first product request.
required_path.observable_result: Sandbox returns a bearer access token and any selected follow-on API succeeds.

prerequisites.description: Developer app access requires Owner, Admin, or Developer roles.

external_gates.description: Connected Account APIs for Embedded Finance testing require contacting Airwallex Sales.

unavoidable_waits.description: Sandbox account provisioning is described as instant after Create sandbox account.

platform_outcomes.description: Airwallex activates the sandbox account for immediate web app and API testing.
Authentication login returns a bearer access token valid for a limited period.

excluded.item: Production API host and production key generation
excluded.reason: Sandbox overview places production switch after sandbox testing.

excluded.item: Simulation APIs for deposits, payouts, issuing, and related products
excluded.reason: Presented as next-step testing tools after authentication setup.

sources.title: Developer Tools API overview
evidence_supported: Developer tools entry to API and sandbox routes

uncertainties.question: Which API-key type and resource scope should define the canonical first authentication route?
uncertainties.impact: Admin keys versus scoped org/account permissions change required form fields and which follow-on APIs the token can call.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Choose admin or a specific scoped matrix, then verify one sandbox walkthrough from signup through the chosen terminal.

uncertainties.question: Is Obtain access token itself first success, or must a follow-on product call such as balances/current be included?
uncertainties.impact: The terminal outcome and whether implementation continues past authentication change action counts.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A corpus policy decision on authentication-only versus first authenticated resource read for Airwallex.
